name: Muskallunge (SS-262)
events: 20 Apr 1943 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Saunders, USN) departed New London, Connecticut and arrived at Newport, Rhode Island for torpedo firing tests.
29 May 1943 Having completed torpedo firing tests, USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Saunders, USN), returned to New London, Connecticut from Newport, Rhode Island.
11 Jul 1943 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Saunders, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for the Panama Canal Zone.
23 Jul 1943 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Saunders, USN) transited the Panama Canal.
7 Aug 1943 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. Willard Arthur Saunders) arrived at Pearl Harbor from New London.
7 Sep 1943 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. Willard Arthur Saunders) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 1st war patrol, and was ordered to patrol in the Palau area.
25 Oct 1943 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. Willard Arthur Saunders) ended her 1st war patrol at Pearl Harbor.
27 Nov 1943 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. Michael P. Russillo) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 2nd war patrol, and was ordered to patrol in the Caroline Islands area.
21 Jan 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. M.P. Russillo) ended her 2nd war patrol at Pearl Harbor. She was ordered to the Mare Island Navy Yard to solve the problems with her engines and general overhaul.
30 Apr 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. M.P. Russillo) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 3rd war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the Mariana Islands area.
4 Jul 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. M.P. Russillo) ended her 3rd war patrol at Fremantle, Australia.
1 Aug 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. M.P. Russillo) departed from Fremantle for her 4th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the South China Sea.
21 Aug 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. M.P. Russillo) torpedoed and sank the Japanese troop transport Durban Maru (7163 GRT) off Cam Ranh Bay, French Indochina in position 11°45'N, 109°46'E.
8 Sep 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. M.P. Russillo) ended her 4th war patrol at Fremantle.
19 Oct 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. Leonce A. Lajaunie, Jr.) departed from Fremantle for her 5th war patrol, and was ordered to patrol in the South China Sea.
14 Dec 1944 USS Muskallunge (Lt.Cdr. L.A. Lajaunie, Jr.) ended her 5th war patrol at Pearl Harbor.
16 Dec 1944 USS Muskallunge departed from Pearl Harbor bound for the Mare Island Navy Yard for a major overhaul.
9 Apr 1945 With her overhaul completed USS Muskallunge returns to Pearl Harbor.

22 Apr 1945 USS Capitaine (Lt.Cdr. E.S. Friedrick, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR), USS Muskalunge (Lt.Cdr. L.A. Lajaunie, Jr., USN) and USS Segundo (Cdr. James D. Fulp, Jr., USN).

23 Apr 1945 USS Capitaine (Lt.Cdr. E.S. Friedrick, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR), USS Muskalunge (Lt.Cdr. L.A. Lajaunie, Jr., USN) and USS Segundo (Cdr. James D. Fulp, Jr., USN).
26 Apr 1945 USS Muskallunge (Cmdr William Henry Lawrence) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 6th war patrol, and was ordered to patrol off Formosa.
15 Jun 1945 USS Muskallunge (Cdr. W.H. Lawrence) ended her 6th war patrol at Midway.

22 Jul 1945 USS Muskalunge (T/Cdr. W.H. Lawrence, USN) and USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. W.F. Schlech, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway together with USS Loeser (Lt.Cdr. J. Proctor, USNR), USS Sicard (Lt. A.G. Fenley, USNR), USS PC-778 (Lt. F.J. Whittlessey, USNR), USS ATR-26 (Lt. R. MacLetchie, USNR) and USS ATR-63 (Lt. R.W. Coffey, USN).

23 Jul 1945 USS Muskalunge (T/Cdr. W.H. Lawrence, USN) and USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. W.F. Schlech, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway together with USS Loeser (Lt.Cdr. J. Proctor, USNR), USS Sicard (Lt. A.G. Fenley, USNR), USS PC-778 (Lt. F.J. Whittlessey, USNR), USS ATR-26 (Lt. R. MacLetchie, USNR) and USS ATR-63 (Lt. R.W. Coffey, USN).

24 Jul 1945 USS Muskalunge (T/Cdr. W.H. Lawrence, USN), USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. W.F. Schlech, Jr., USN) and USS Blackfin (T/Lt.Cdr. W.L. Kitch, USN) conducted exercises off Midway together with USS Loeser (Lt.Cdr. J. Proctor, USNR), USS Sicard (Lt. A.G. Fenley, USNR), USS PC-778 (Lt. F.J. Whittlessey, USNR), USS ATR-26 (Lt. R. MacLetchie, USNR) and USS ATR-63 (Lt. R.W. Coffey, USN).

26 Jul 1945 USS Muskalunge (T/Cdr. W.H. Lawrence, USN) and USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. W.F. Schlech, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway together with USS Sicard (Lt. A.G. Fenley, USNR), USS PC-778 (Lt. F.J. Whittlessey, USNR) and USS ATR-63 (Lt. R.W. Coffey, USN).

27 Jul 1945 USS Muskalunge (T/Cdr. W.H. Lawrence, USN) and USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. W.F. Schlech, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Midway together with USS Loeser (Lt.Cdr. J. Proctor, USNR), USS Sicard (Lt. A.G. Fenley, USNR), USS PC-778 (Lt. F.J. Whittlessey, USNR) and USS ATR-63 (Lt. R.W. Coffey, USN).
30 Jul 1945 USS Muskallunge (Cmdr William Henry Lawrence) departed from Midway for her 7th war patrol, and was ordered to patrol off the Kurile Islands.
